vocab.example: I have a keen interest in architectural photography, especially when it comes to capturing the intricate details of historical landmarks.

vocab.meaning: sự đối xứng mang tính thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: I love taking photos of modern buildings that exhibit perfect aesthetic symmetry, as it creates a very satisfying image.

vocab.meaning: sự đặt cạnh nhau (thường để chỉ sự tương phản)
vocab.example: I enjoy capturing the juxtaposition of ancient temples nestled between sleek, contemporary skyscrapers.

vocab.meaning: sự đan xen/hiệu ứng của ánh sáng và bóng tối
vocab.example: The play of light and shadow on the building's facade at sunset makes for a truly captivating photograph.

vocab.meaning: sự phức tạp về cấu trúc
vocab.example: I often find myself photographing bridges and stadiums because their structural complexity is fascinating to look at.
Modern office blocks often feature repetitive geometric patterns that are perfect for minimalist photography.

vocab.meaning: những nét chạm trổ công phu
vocab.example: I prefer taking close-up shots of ornate carvings on old cathedrals to document the craftsmanship of the past.

vocab.meaning: điểm quan sát/góc nhìn thuận lợi
vocab.example: I spent hours looking for the perfect vantage point to get a clear shot of the city's clock tower.

vocab.meaning: những bề mặt/vân phủ mang dấu ấn thời gian (phong hóa)
vocab.example: I find beauty in the weathered textures of abandoned buildings, as they tell a story of neglect and history.

vocab.meaning: sự tương phản hoàn toàn/gay gắt
vocab.example: The blue glass of the tower provides a stark contrast against the grey concrete of the pavement below.
